message:
feat(fwc): add two-operation pipe with field mapping engine

New pipe module enables chaining operations: output of A feeds input of
B via configurable field mappings. Supports --map expression syntax
(source.path -> target), literal values, nested targets, and JSON
mapping files. Includes parse/evaluate/plan pipeline with 50 unit tests.

Also fixes: render.rs jaq Val conversion, extract field initialization,
match arm deduplication, and clippy cleanup across render/main modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
